name: SaveAlertState
description: Saves current alert snapshot to AlertState after fetching alerts. Call after GetAlertSummary. Can include agent_actionable and agent_not_actionable (comma-separated alert types) to mark which are actionable.

minutes.description: Time period in minutes (e.g. 1 for last 1 minute). Overrides hours.

agent_actionable.description: Comma-separated alert types agent marks as actionable (e.g. timeout,error_rate)

agent_not_actionable.description: Comma-separated alert types agent marks as non-actionable

name: GetAlertState
description: Gets current alert state (snapshot, context, recent actions). Use for actionable analysis and action history context.

name: GetActionableAlerts
description: Returns which alerts are actionable. DEFAULT: all alerts are actionable. Only non-actionable if user explicitly marked via MarkAlertActionable. Use same minutes/hours as GetAlertSummary.

minutes.description: Time period in minutes (e.g. 1 for last 1 minute). Overrides hours.
